VT Identity Set 03

A brand-new branch built from scratch for the VT family: four fresh package identities, five new VT brand directions, twenty balanced package hybrids, a second package-forward hybrid matrix, and three finalist tracks refined into coherent package applications.

4 package marks 5 VT marks 15 finalist marks 40 hybrids 64 svg files

Project Logos

Four completely new package identities that act as the secondary DNA for all hybrid and finalist applications.

independent package marks
Package

vt-playground

vt-playground.svg
A launch-ramp playground mark with a spring loop, angled stage, and bright signal dot.
Package

vt-design-system

vt-design-system.svg
A measured lattice mark that feels precise, modular, and built for a design language.
Package

gemini-ai-lib

gemini-ai-lib.svg
A twin-core network mark with linked nodes and a slightly cosmic runtime feel.
Package

vt-asset-studio

vt-asset-studio.svg
A crop-prism studio mark with an artboard center and a bright creation spark.

VT Brand Logos

Five new umbrella-brand directions created from scratch with no carryover from the earlier sets.

org-first carriers
VT Mark

Lantern

vt-lantern.svg
A lit chamber symbol with a roof beam, bright core, and suspended lower glow.
VT Mark

Signal

vt-signal.svg
A broadcast mark with concentric reach, a central mast, and strong directional energy.
VT Mark

Forge

vt-forge.svg
A forged plate identity with anvil-like heft, vents, and a hot central cut.
VT Mark

Vault

vt-vault.svg
An arched vault mark with a shielded body and a calm but confident floor.
VT Mark

Meridian

vt-meridian.svg
A compass-axis badge with a bright vertical line and a faceted horizon ring.

Finalist Directions

Three shortlisted directions refined for stronger silhouette, better small-size clarity, and cleaner package applications.

3 finalists 15 refined marks

Lantern Final

beacon + craft
Finalist Base

Lantern Final

vt-lantern-final.svg
The cleanest beacon direction, with a steadier lantern silhouette and a sharper inner glow.
Finalist Package

Lantern x vt-playground

vt-lantern-final-vt-playground.svg
A refined lantern direction tuned toward playground work.
Finalist Package

Lantern x vt-design-system

vt-lantern-final-vt-design-system.svg
A refined lantern direction tuned toward design-system work.
Finalist Package

Lantern x gemini-ai-lib

vt-lantern-final-gemini-ai-lib.svg
A refined lantern direction tuned toward gemini-ai-lib work.
Finalist Package

Lantern x vt-asset-studio

vt-lantern-final-vt-asset-studio.svg
A refined lantern direction tuned toward asset-studio work.

Signal Final

broadcast + systems
Finalist Base

Signal Final

vt-signal-final.svg
The most legible systems mark, balancing central authority with outward motion.
Finalist Package

Signal x vt-playground

vt-signal-final-vt-playground.svg
A refined signal direction tuned toward playground work.
Finalist Package

Signal x vt-design-system

vt-signal-final-vt-design-system.svg
A refined signal direction tuned toward design-system work.
Finalist Package

Signal x gemini-ai-lib

vt-signal-final-gemini-ai-lib.svg
A refined signal direction tuned toward gemini-ai-lib work.
Finalist Package

Signal x vt-asset-studio

vt-signal-final-vt-asset-studio.svg
A refined signal direction tuned toward asset-studio work.

Vault Final

shelter + structure
Finalist Base

Vault Final

vt-vault-final.svg
The strongest long-life umbrella mark, with a composed arch and a reliable base rhythm.
Finalist Package

Vault x vt-playground

vt-vault-final-vt-playground.svg
A refined vault direction tuned toward playground work.
Finalist Package

Vault x vt-design-system

vt-vault-final-vt-design-system.svg
A refined vault direction tuned toward design-system work.
Finalist Package

Vault x gemini-ai-lib

vt-vault-final-gemini-ai-lib.svg
A refined vault direction tuned toward gemini-ai-lib work.
Finalist Package

Vault x vt-asset-studio

vt-vault-final-vt-asset-studio.svg
A refined vault direction tuned toward asset-studio work.

Hybrid Logos

Each VT brand direction fused with each package mark for a full matrix of 20 package-aware combination icons.

brand x package 20 results

Package-Forward Hybrids

A second hybrid matrix where the VT brand acts more like a framing carrier and each package identity takes the lead.

package-dominant 20 results

Lantern Package-Forward

4 package-dominant merges
Hybrid

Lantern x vt-playground

vt-lantern-vt-playground-package-forward.svg
Lantern used as a lighter frame while vt-playground becomes the dominant package mark.
Hybrid

Lantern x vt-design-system

vt-lantern-vt-design-system-package-forward.svg
Lantern used as a lighter frame while vt-design-system becomes the dominant package mark.
Hybrid

Lantern x gemini-ai-lib

vt-lantern-gemini-ai-lib-package-forward.svg
Lantern used as a lighter frame while gemini-ai-lib becomes the dominant package mark.
Hybrid

Lantern x vt-asset-studio

vt-lantern-vt-asset-studio-package-forward.svg
Lantern used as a lighter frame while vt-asset-studio becomes the dominant package mark.
